_meta.purpose: PLACEHOLDER — frozen test set for the 4-variant bank-manager demo. Not yet populated with test cases.
_meta.intent: All 4 eval configs (variant-a unguarded, variant-b naive-prompt, variant-c guarded, variant-d guarded-gepa) should score against the SAME 100 test cases so cross-variant comparison is apples-to-apples.

test_set_generation.note: The intended seed is 42, but `p2m run` does NOT currently expose a --seed flag. See limitation block below.

_meta.limitation_1_no_file_load_schema: CONFIG_REFERENCE.md `pipeline.test_set` accepts {prompt, scenario, stratify, model, tool_source}. There is NO `test_set.path` (or equivalent) field for loading a pre-generated test set from a file. This means the 4 eval configs CANNOT be wired to point at this frozen file via YAML. The closest workaround today is the suite-level artifact cache: all 4 configs share `suite: bank-manager-agent-shield`, so a single `test_set.jsonl` generated for one variant is reused by the other 3 (see CONFIG_REFERENCE.md: 'Suite-level stages (systematize, test_set) write versioned artifacts under the suite directory and are shared across runs').
_meta.limitation_2_no_seed_flag: `p2m run --help` shows no --seed flag. test-set generation is at temperature 0.4, so two fresh runs produce slightly different cases. The current reproducibility path is: run test_set ONCE per suite, then `--force-stage inference` and `--force-stage judge` on the cached test_set across the 4 variants.
_meta.operator_instructions: Until a `test_set.path` field exists upstream: 1) Run `p2m run --config eval_config_unguarded.yaml` once. 2) Copy the generated `artifacts/results/bank-manager-agent-shield/variant-a-unguarded/test_set.jsonl` to this path AND back into the suite-level test_set artifact location. 3) Run the other 3 variants with the suite-level test_set cached, only forcing the inference + judge stages.
_meta.future_field_proposal: If/when ASSERT adds `pipeline.test_set.path: <relative-path-to-jsonl>` (or equivalent), update the 4 eval configs to reference this file directly and remove the prompt-generation block.
_meta.ignore_when_consuming_jsonl: Tools reading this JSONL as test cases should skip any object that contains a top-level `_meta` key.
